mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, category, retrieval_strategy, chunk_strategy, chunk_size, chunk_overlap, separators_json, document_count, created_by_user_id, created_by_name, strategy_version, is_deleted, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at FROM km_knowledge_base WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, name, description, category, retrieval_strategy, chunk_strategy, chunk_size, chunk_overlap, separators_json, document_count, created_by_user_id, created_by_name, strategy_version, is_deleted, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at FROM km_knowledge_base WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO km_knowledge_base ( name, description, category, retrieval_strategy, chunk_strategy, chunk_size, chunk_overlap, separators_json, document_count, created_by_user_id, created_by_name, strategy_version, is_deleted, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{description}, #{category}, #{retrievalStrategy}, #{chunkStrategy}, #{chunkSize}, #{chunkOverlap}, #{separatorsJson}, #{documentCount}, #{createdByUserId}, #{createdByName}, #{strategyVersion}, 0, NULL, NOW(), NULL )
mapper.update: UPDATE km_knowledge_base SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, category = #{category}, retrieval_strategy = #{retrievalStrategy}, chunk_strategy = #{chunkStrategy}, chunk_size = #{chunkSize}, chunk_overlap = #{chunkOverlap}, separators_json = #{separatorsJson}, created_by_user_id = #{createdByUserId}, created_by_name = #{createdByName}, strategy_version = #{strategyVersion}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE km_knowledge_base SET is_deleted = 1, deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE km_knowledge_base SET document_count = document_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE km_knowledge_base SET document_count = GREATEST(document_count - 1, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
